sections.text: GregTech replaces vanilla ore deposits with huge veins containing thousands of ore blocks. Veins generate on a grid, spaced 3 chunks apart from each other. Each vein has up to four different ores: primary, secondary, tertiary, and sporadic.

Surface rocks indicate the type of veins below them. In JEI, press U on the Tiny Dust you mined from a surface rock to see what vein it belongs to. Veins are harder to find than vanilla ores, but when you find one, you get a massive supply.
Prospecting with the Prospector's Scanner helps locate veins underground. The HV Prospector has a wider scanning range than the LV version.
